seoDescription: Browse chat, image, speech, and embedding models available through one unified API contract.

elements.text: Use one authentication model, one billing surface, and one observability layer while selecting the best model for each workload.

hero.heading: One API, Many Models
hero.body: Route across curated model families for chat, image, speech, and embeddings with stable request and response contracts.

sections.title: Coverage Across Core Modalities
sections.body: Support production workloads with model options optimized for quality, speed, and economics.

cards.title: Chat And Reasoning
cards.description: Power assistants, coding copilots, and internal automation agents.

cards.title: Image And Video
cards.description: Generate or transform media assets with predictable throughput.

cards.title: Speech And Transcription
cards.description: Deliver voice interfaces and searchable media transcripts at scale.

sections.title: How To Select Models
sections.body: Balance quality, latency, and cost using measurable criteria and staged rollout practices.

cards.title: Latency Targets
cards.description: Map user-facing response requirements to realistic model throughput.

cards.title: Quality Benchmarks
cards.description: Define task-specific scorecards for acceptance before production release.

cards.title: Fallback Strategy
cards.description: Prevent outages with policy-based fallback routes and observability.

contactPanel.heading: Need help choosing your model mix?
contactPanel.body: We can map your workloads to a practical model portfolio with clear tradeoffs and rollout steps.
contactPanel.responseTime: Model advisory responses within one business day
